THEINSATIABLE-STRIKE_INSATIABLE.title: Strike
THEINSATIABLE-DEFEND_INSATIABLE.title: Defend
THEINSATIABLE-SAND_STONE.title: Sand Stone
THEINSATIABLE-SAND_BLOWING.title: Sand Blowing
THEINSATIABLE-SANDWORM_BITE.title: Sandworm Bite
THEINSATIABLE-SANDWORM_BITE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each [gold]Quicksand[/gold] on the enemy.
THEINSATIABLE-SAND_STORM.title: Sand Storm
THEINSATIABLE-SAND_STORM.description:
Apply {QuickSandPower:diff()} [gold]Quicksand[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.
THEINSATIABLE-APPENDAGE_SLICE.title: Appendage Slice
THEINSATIABLE-QUICKSAND_STRIKE.title: Quicksand Strike
THEINSATIABLE-SPINNING_SILK.title: Spinning Silk
THEINSATIABLE-EARTHQUAKE.title: Earthquake
THEINSATIABLE-EARTHQUAKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply {QuickSandPower:diff()} [gold]Quicksand[/gold] to ALL enemies.
THEINSATIABLE-SWARM_UP.title: Swarm Up
THEINSATIABLE-SWARM_UP.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {Repeat:diff()} times.
THEINSATIABLE-LYING_IN_SAND.title: Lying in Sand
THEINSATIABLE-BLIND_BY_SAND.title: Blind by Sand
THEINSATIABLE-TEST_THE_STONES.title: Test the Stones
THEINSATIABLE-INSATIABLE_THRASH.title: Insatiable Thrash
THEINSATIABLE-INSATIABLE_THRASH.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy has [gold]Quicksand[/gold], attack twice.
THEINSATIABLE-TOXIC_SPIT.title: Toxic Spit
THEINSATIABLE-TOXIC_SPIT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Toxin[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
THEINSATIABLE-CHOMP.title: Chomp
THEINSATIABLE-CHOMP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Add two [gold]Dazed[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
THEINSATIABLE-INSATIABLE_BODY_SLAM.title: Insatiable Body Slam
THEINSATIABLE-SAND_STONE_STRIKE.title: Sand Stone Strike
THEINSATIABLE-SAND_STONE_STRIKE.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Sand Stone[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEINSATIABLE-REPAIR_HIVE.title: Repair Hive
THEINSATIABLE-REPAIR_HIVE.description: [gold]Transform[/gold] all Status cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into [gold]Sand Stone[/gold]. Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each card [gold]Transformed[/gold] this way.
THEINSATIABLE-FLING_SAND.title: Fling Sand
THEINSATIABLE-FLING_SAND.description:
Apply {QuickSandPower:diff()} [gold]Quicksand[/gold].
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEINSATIABLE-FLING_SAND.selectionScreen: Choose a card to put into your Hand
THEINSATIABLE-QUICK_THORNS.title: Quick Thorns
THEINSATIABLE-AVOID_PREDATORS.title: Avoid Predators
THEINSATIABLE-AVOID_PREDATORS.descriptio:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Until the start of your next turn, you are unaffected by [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], [gold]Weak[/gold], and [gold]Fragile[/gold] applied by enemies.
THEINSATIABLE-SEDIMENTATION.title: Sedimentation
THEINSATIABLE-GOLD_AND_SAND.title: Gold and Sand
THEINSATIABLE-DEATH_HIGHWAY.title: Death Highway
THEINSATIABLE-DEATH_HIGHWAY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Whenever you apply [gold]Quicksand[/gold], move this card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] or [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to the top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
THEINSATIABLE-INSECT_PLAGUE.title: Insect Plague
THEINSATIABLE-INSECT_PLAGUE.description:
If you attack this enemy this turn, apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
THEINSATIABLE-SAND_WALL.title: Sand Wall
THEINSATIABLE-SAND_WALL.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply {QuickSandPower:diff()} [gold]Quicksand[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Add a [gold]Sand Stone[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEINSATIABLE-REINFORCE.title: Reinforce
THEINSATIABLE-REINFORCE.description:
Double your current [gold]Block[/gold] and all creatures' [gold]Quicksand[/gold].
Copy all [gold]Sand Stone[/gold] cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEINSATIABLE-TENDER_TOXIC.title: Tender Toxic
THEINSATIABLE-TENDER_TOXIC.description: For each card you play this turn, ALL enemies lose {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
THEINSATIABLE-SWIM_SAND_SEA.title: Swim Sand Sea
THEINSATIABLE-SWIM_SAND_SEA.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you apply [gold]Quicksand[/gold] anywhere, add this card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEINSATIABLE-SHRINKER_LASER.title: Shrinker Laser
THEINSATIABLE-SHRINKER_LASER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
For {Repeat:diff()} turns, this enemy's attacks deal [blue]{DamageDecrease}%[/blue] less damage.
THEINSATIABLE-DRUG_RESISTANCE.title: Drug Resistance
THEINSATIABLE-DRUG_RESISTANCE.descriptio: You are immune to negative effects gained during this combat.
THEINSATIABLE-CRYSTAL_CLEAR.title: Crystal Clear
THEINSATIABLE-CRYSTAL_CLEAR.description: Whenever you apply [gold]Quicksand[/gold], deal {CrystalClearPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
THEINSATIABLE-SCORCHED_EARTH.title: Scorched Earth
THEINSATIABLE-SCORCHED_EARTH.description:
Apply {QuickSandPower:diff()} [gold]Quicksand[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Each layer of [gold]Quicksand[/gold] also increases damage taken from attacks by [blue]4%[/blue].
THEINSATIABLE-MUDDY.title: Muddy
THEINSATIABLE-MUDDY.description:
Apply {QuickSandPower:diff()} [gold]Quicksand[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Quicksand[/gold] effects on enemies are doubled.
THEINSATIABLE-SANDWORM_SHOCK.title: Sandworm Shock
THEINSATIABLE-SANDWORM_SHOCK.description: Apply {QuickSandPower:diff()} [gold]Quicksand[/gold] and {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies X{IfUpgraded:show:+1} times.
THEINSATIABLE-MOBILE_DUNE.title: Mobile Dune
THEINSATIABLE-MOBILE_DUNE.description: At the start of your turn, evenly distribute [gold]Quicksand[/gold] layers among ALL enemies.
THEINSATIABLE-MAKING_SANDCASTLES.title: Making Sandcastles
THEINSATIABLE-SALIVATE.title: Salivate
THEINSATIABLE-SALIVATE.description: Whenever [gold]Quicksand[/gold] layers are reduced, gain [gold]Vigor[/gold] equal to the number of layers reduced.
THEINSATIABLE-LUNGING_BITE.title: Lunging Bite
THEINSATIABLE-LUNGING_BITE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Deal double damage to enemies with [gold]Block[/gold].
THEINSATIABLE-GOLD_RUSH.title: Gold Rush
THEINSATIABLE-BURROWED.title: Burrowed
THEINSATIABLE-BURROWED.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply {QuickSandPower:diff()} [gold]Quicksand[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Block[/gold] is not removed at the start of your turn as long as it is not broken.
THEINSATIABLE-EVAPORATE.title: Evaporate
THEINSATIABLE-EVAPORATE.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Apply {QuickSandPower:diff()} [gold]Quicksand[/gold].
If the enemy's current HP is not greater than their [gold]Quicksand[/gold] layers, [gold]Devour[/gold] them.
THEINSATIABLE-WEATHERING.title: Weathering
THEINSATIABLE-WEATHERING.description:
At the start of your turn, draw {Cards:diff()} additional cards and randomly [red]Afflict[/red] a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold]: [purple]Weathering[/purple].
Your cards are immune to other [red]Afflictions[/red].
THEINSATIABLE-INSATIABLE_SWALLOW.title: Insatiable Swallow
THEINSATIABLE-INSATIABLE_DRAW_PILE.title: Draw Pile
THEINSATIABLE-INSATIABLE_DRAW_PILE.descr: Choose a card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to [gold]Devour[/gold].
THEINSATIABLE-INSATIABLE_HAND_PILE.title: Hand
THEINSATIABLE-INSATIABLE_HAND_PILE.descr: Choose a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] to [gold]Devour[/gold].
THEINSATIABLE-INSATIABLE_DISCARD_PILE.de: Choose a card in your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] to [gold]Devour[/gold].
THEINSATIABLE-INSATIABLE_NO_ESCAPE.title: No Escape!
THEINSATIABLE-INSATIABLE_NO_ESCAPE.descr:
Add three [gold]Insatiable Swallow[/gold] cards into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
When you take unblocked attack damage, add an [gold]Insatiable Swallow[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
At the end of your turn, if there are no [gold]Insatiable Swallow[/gold] cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], [gold]Hand[/gold], or [gold]Discard Pile[/gold], [gold]Devour[/gold] ALL enemies.
THEINSATIABLE-HIVE_MIND.title: Hive Mind
THEINSATIABLE-HIVE_MIND.description: When you play a card, play all cards with the same name from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
THEINSATIABLE-LURCH_FOR_LUNCH.title: Lurch for Lunch
THEINSATIABLE-LURCH_FOR_LUNCH.descriptio:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Add an [gold]Insatiable Swallow[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEINSATIABLE-HAVE_DINNER.title: Have Dinner
THEINSATIABLE-HAVE_DINNER.description:
Choose [blue]any[/blue] card to [gold]Devour[/gold].
If a card was [gold]Devoured[/gold], draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
THEINSATIABLE-BE_FULL.title: Be Full
THEINSATIABLE-BE_FULL.description:
Choose [blue]any[/blue] card to [gold]Devour[/gold].
If a card was [gold]Devoured[/gold], draw {Cards:diff()} cards and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
THEINSATIABLE-LOCUST_OF_CONQUEST.title: Locust of Conquest
THEINSATIABLE-LOCUST_OF_CONQUEST.descrip:
[blue]Corresponds to Power cards[/blue]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {Repeat:diff()} times.
THEINSATIABLE-LOCUST_OF_FAMINE.title: Locust of Famine
THEINSATIABLE-LOCUST_OF_FAMINE.descripti:
[blue]Corresponds to Skill cards[/blue]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Apply {QuickSandPower:diff()} [gold]Quicksand[/gold].
THEINSATIABLE-LOCUST_OF_PESTILENCE.title: Locust of Pestilence
THEINSATIABLE-LOCUST_OF_PESTILENCE.descr:
[blue]Corresponds to Status cards[/blue]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold].
THEINSATIABLE-LOCUST_OF_WAR.title: Locust of War
THEINSATIABLE-LOCUST_OF_WAR.description:
[blue]Corresponds to Attack cards[/blue]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
THEINSATIABLE-LOCUST_OF_DEATH.title: Locust of Death
THEINSATIABLE-LOCUST_OF_DEATH.descriptio:
[blue]Corresponds to Curse cards[/blue]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
THEINSATIABLE-LOCUST_OF_ABYSS.title: Locust of Abyss
THEINSATIABLE-LOCUST_OF_ABYSS.descriptio:
[blue]Corresponds to Mission cards[/blue]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
THEINSATIABLE-ABYSS.title: Abyss
THEINSATIABLE-ABYSS.description:
Choose [blue]any[/blue] six cards to [gold]Devour[/gold].
Based on the types of cards [gold]Devoured[/gold], add corresponding {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded[/gold] |}[gold]Locust[/gold] cards into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
